Text: Hi SUPPLIER_NAME, TAILORED_EMPATHY/ASSURANCE_STATEMENT Wayfair shipping accounts are not set up for POs shipping into the US at this time. To ship POs from CA into the US you will need to arrange this with a carrier of your choice on your own account. Help us improve by sharing your feedback. You will receive an email shortly with a survey, or you can provide feedback on any closed tickets in Partner Home. We sincerely value your partnership. CLOSING, FIRST_NAME_LAST_INITIAL

Hi SUPPLIER_NAME, TAILORED_EMPATHY/ASSURANCE_STATEMENT Carrier tracking shows that ENTER_PO was picked up on ENTER_DATE, using carrier PRO ENTER_PRO. When the carrier scans the package the tracking will upload automatically, as long as our shipping process was followed. Please find the correct shipping process outlined in this Help Center article - https://partners.wayfair.com/help/2/article/328 Your team can also manage tracking directly in Partner Home. Please find the detailed process for updating the PO in Dropship Orders outlined in this Help Center article: https://partners.wayfair.com/help/2/article/1252 If the order becomes overdue, please be sure to update the tracking information in the overdue order section on the Wayfair Partner Home page. To clear an overdue order alert please follow these steps: Partner Home > Order Alerts, search for the PO and select ‘Yes’ under ‘Order Shipped?’ > Enter the Actual Ship Date and Tracking Number and select the blue ‘Save Changes’ button at the top of the page. Help us improve by sharing your feedback. You will receive an email shortly with a survey, or you can provide feedback on any closed tickets in Partner Home. We sincerely value your partnership. CLOSING, FIRST_NAME_LAST_INITIAL

Hi SUPPLIER_NAME, TAILORED_EMPATHY/ASSURANCE_STATEMENT Our LTL carriers have specific pallet requirements that must be adhered to. While they may occasionally make exceptions, there is a possibility that non-palletized freight may be rejected due to driver resources. To avoid any missed pickups in the future, please ensure that all freight is properly staged with the attached BOL. If the pickup for ENTER_PO is not completed by ENTER_DATE, please reopen this ticket and provide us with the original POs that are impacted, and we will gladly provide further assistance. Template Use Case/Title: Wrong Party/Internal Ticket Entry (*** This should only be used in an instance of customer service entering a ticket *** )
Text: Hi NAME, Carrier tickets must only be submitted by SOPS/Account Ops or the supplier. Our suppliers do not have visibility on any updates/requests unless they have initiated the ticket. In order for Freight to communicate with the supplier and the carrier simultaneously, these tickets need to be entered by the supplier via the extranet. Help us improve by sharing your feedback. You will receive an email shortly with a survey, or you can provide feedback on any closed tickets in Partner Home. We sincerely value your partnership. CLOSING, FIRST_NAME_LAST_INITIAL
